title: The World Reacts
description: The Marines, pirates, and rulers face the aftermath of Doflamingo’s defeat.
scene: On pages 4–8, King Riku, Marines, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Rebecca deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The nightmare is over, and the cries ring out: Joy! Joy! JOY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ain't gonna finish me off?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: However, I'll expect

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't need to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Looks like everything's over...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ui... HA... HA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What a softie! You and your brother, the both of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: D'ya wanna hear what Ace said when he lost to our captain on Banaro Island,

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: And was about to be shipped off to the Marines?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Under- Ground trade port

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hurry! It's finally come to an end!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Marines'll be here any minute!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What about sending word to the Chief of Staff!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We're trying to reach him right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He's not picking up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He doesn't pick up unless he feels like it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: guarantee you you you'll bust a lung once ya hear it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: SUMMER: And I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: HA... After finding out that he was going to be executed, ace said this:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: "Please don't tell my little brothers."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Now that's a moron!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Didn't even know the price of his own life!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: If the great "fire fist ace" was to be captured by the Marines, of course they'd make as big of a deal about it as they could!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: They milked his life for 120% of what it was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: THAT'S ENOUGH. SHUT YOUR FILLTY MOUTH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: His last thoughts be- fore leaving this world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I've spent every night since that day agonizing over what they might have been!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Ughgya...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I don't need a piece of shit like you to explain that to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: That's it... lose your cool... let your guard down you fool!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I ain't gonna let the Mera Mera no mi slip through my fingers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I don't know how that kinda regret doesn't kill ya'...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: that despite having all yer status and power,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: You weren't able to go save your own brother!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: When he needed you most, you were no where to be seen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Napping, were ya!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: And that's why I refuse to carry any more regrets!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Hireen!!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
